meta.notes: Long-form per-(month, category) rows extracted from AMFI Monthly Reports. Categories: multi-cap, large-cap, large-mid-cap, mid-cap, small-cap, dividend-yield, value-contra, focused, sectoral-thematic, elss, flexi-cap, conservative-hybrid, balanced-aggressive-hybrid, baf-daa, multi-asset, equity-savings, retirement, childrens. Optional fields are OMITTED when not detected — never zeroed. Rows merged by (month, categorySlug); prior rows preserved when the current run doesn't re-extract them. categoryHitsThisRun=432, totalCategoryRows=432.
